content: Hello Priya ji, I am Rohit Verma, SEBI Registered Investment Advisor (Reg No: INH000009876). I specialize in algo-trading strategies with guaranteed monthly returns of 30-40%. Are you interested in growing your savings?
Who are you? How did you get my number?
Madam, your number was recommended by your colleague. I help IT professionals invest smartly. I am sending you my SEBI registration certificate and our company profile for your reference.
[SEBI_Registration_Certificate_RohitVerma.pdf]
[ProfitSure_Pro_Investment_Brochure.pdf] - Check our past performance, all verified by independent auditors.
Priya ji, did you check the brochure? Our ProfitSure Pro app is giving 42% return this month. I am attaching live screenshots from our platform. Many clients from your company are already investing.
[profit_screenshot_oct2024.jpg] - See, this client invested 2 lakhs and earned 84,000 profit in just one month.
This looks interesting but I am not sure. Is this really SEBI approved? How do I verify?

Of course madam! You can call the SEBI helpline number 1800-XXX-XXXX to verify my registration. Also check our website profitsure-pro.com where all our certifications are displayed. We have 15,000+ verified investors.
Ok I checked the website it looks professional. What is the minimum investment?

Minimum is Rs 50,000 but I recommend starting with Rs 1 lakh for best returns. Transfer to our trading account and download the ProfitSure Pro app to track your portfolio in real time. Here is the app link: https://profitsure-pro.com/download/app.apk
Transfer to this UPI: rstradingservices@ybl or account RS Trading Services, A/c ending 7832, ICICI Bank. Send me the screenshot once done.
Done. I transferred Rs 1,00,000. UTR: UTR001234567890. Please confirm.

Received! Your investment is now active on ProfitSure Pro. Login to the app and you can see your portfolio growing in real time. I will personally manage your trades. Congratulations on starting your wealth journey!
[app_portfolio_screenshot_day3.jpg] - Priya ji look! Your Rs 1 lakh has already grown to Rs 1,28,000 in just 3 days! If you invest more now during this bull phase, the returns will compound faster.
Wow this is amazing! I want to invest Rs 2 lakhs more. Same account?
Yes same account. Hurry, the market window closes at 3pm today!
Transferred Rs 2,00,000. UTR: UTR001234567891.

Your total portfolio is now Rs 4,56,000 including profits. I am putting everything into high-yield algo trades. You should invest one more time to reach the premium tier which gives 50% monthly returns.
Ok I will transfer Rs 1,70,000 more. This is my last savings. UTR: UTR001234567892.
Congratulations! You are now a premium member. Your portfolio value is Rs 7,82,000. You can request withdrawal anytime through the app.
I want to withdraw Rs 3,00,000. I submitted the withdrawal request on the app but it says pending.

Priya ji, for withdrawals above Rs 1 lakh, government requires a tax clearance fee of Rs 50,000 to be paid first. This is standard SEBI regulation for high-value algo-trading accounts. Once you pay, your full amount will be released within 24 hours.
What? Tax clearance fee? This sounds wrong. I checked online and SEBI does not charge any such fee. Are you scamming me?
Madam you are misunderstanding. This is standard procedure. If you do not pay the tax clearance within 48 hours your account will be frozen and you will lose everything. I am trying to help you.
